description: Konami's psychological survival-horror franchise (1999–present), set in a fog-drowned American resort town that warps into a personalized nightmare dimension shaped by each visitor's guilt and trauma. The Team Silent era (SH1–SH4) is the canonical core; the franchise saw a major revival beginning in 2022 with the Bloober Team SH2 Remake and multiple new projects.

media.title: Silent Hill
media.description: Harry Mason searches for his daughter in the fog-shrouded town of Silent Hill, which warps into a hell shaped by a sleeping girl's nightmares and the Order cult's ritual. The original — essential.
media.notes: Core: pcsx_rearmed. Play before SH3.

media.title: Silent Hill: Play Novel
media.description: Visual novel retelling of SH1 with branching choices and some new scenes. Japan-only; fan translation available.
media.notes: Core: mgba. Apply fan translation patch. Low priority.

media.title: Silent Hill 2
media.description: James Sunderland follows a letter from his dead wife into Silent Hill. Pyramid Head. The defining psychological horror game. The masterpiece.
media.notes: PCSX2 for original. Or play the 2024 Bloober Team remake on PS5/PC.

media.title: Silent Hill 3
media.description: Heather Mason is drawn into Silent Hill in a direct sequel to the original. The most visually accomplished Team Silent entry with the best monster design.
media.notes: PCSX2 or PC + SH3EE community patch. Requires SH1 first.

media.title: Silent Hill 4: The Room
media.description: Henry Townshend is locked in his apartment as windows open into Silent Hill, expanding the Order's mythology. Team Silent's final game.
media.notes: PCSX2 or GOG PC version.

media.title: Silent Hill Mobile
media.description: Japan-only mobile game for i-mode / BREW feature phones. No longer accessible — platform defunct. Essentially lost media.
media.notes: ⛔ Defunct. i-mode/BREW platform shut down. No emulator exists.

media.title: Silent Hill: Origins
media.description: Prequel to SH1 — Travis Grady, a trucker who stumbles into Silent Hill before Harry Mason's arrival. Fills in Order backstory.
media.notes: PPSSPP (PSP) or PCSX2 (PS2). Optional — play after SH1 and SH3.

media.title: Silent Hill: The Arcade
media.description: Light-gun rail shooter set between SH1 and SH3. Japan/limited western arcade release. Not emulated.
media.notes: ⛔ Defunct. AM-Hunexs arcade hardware; not supported by MAME or any emulator.

media.title: Silent Hill: Homecoming
media.description: Alex Shepherd returns to Shepherd's Glen, a town connected to Silent Hill. Combat-heavy, action-oriented — the beginning of the western developer era's decline.
media.notes: PC (GOG) or RPCS3.

media.title: Silent Hill Mobile 2
media.description: Sequel to SH Mobile on the same Japan-only feature phone platform. New monster designs. No longer accessible.
media.notes: ⛔ Defunct. Lost media.

media.title: Silent Hill Mobile 3
media.description: Final entry in the Japan mobile trilogy. Same platform fate as SH Mobile 1–2. Effectively lost.
media.notes: ⛔ Defunct. Lost media.

media.title: Silent Hill: Shattered Memories
media.description: A psychological reimagining of SH1 that adapts its story to player behavior. No combat — only running. An alternate reality SH1, not a sequel or prequel.
media.notes: Dolphin (Wii preferred for motion controls). Non-canon reimagining.

media.title: Silent Hill: Orphan
media.description: North American BREW feature phone game. Konami's attempt to bring Silent Hill to US mobile. Primitive gameplay; considered lost media.
media.notes: ⛔ Defunct. BREW platform dead. Partial documentation survives on GameFAQs.

media.title: Silent Hill: Orphan 2
media.description: Sequel to SH: Orphan on the same BREW platform. Same accessibility fate — inaccessible.
media.notes: ⛔ Defunct. Lost media.

media.title: Silent Hill: Downpour
media.description: Murphy Pendleton, a convict, navigates Silent Hill with an open-world structure, side quests, and a rain mechanic. The most ambitious but technically roughest western entry.
media.notes: RPCS3. Completionists only.

media.title: Silent Hill HD Collection
media.description: Compilation of SH2 and SH3 for PS3/360. Infamously broken — missing fog, broken audio, re-recorded voices. Avoid in favor of PS2 originals or the 2024 SH2 remake.
media.notes: ⚠️ Avoid. Use original PS2 versions via PCSX2 or the 2024 remake.

media.title: Silent Hill: Book of Memories
media.description: Isometric action-RPG co-op dungeon crawler set in the Silent Hill universe. Not survival horror. Panned for being completely off-genre.
media.notes: Vita3K (experimental). Curiosity item only.

media.title: Silent Hill: Escape
media.description: Endless runner mobile game. Promotional tie-in. Delisted from iOS and Android app stores.
media.notes: ⛔ Delisted. APK preserved in fan communities. Throwaway tie-in.

media.title: P.T. (Playable Teaser for Silent Hills)
media.description: The legendary teaser for the canceled Silent Hills — a looping hallway of escalating psychological horror by Hideo Kojima and Guillermo del Toro. Delisted from PSN in 2015. The greatest demo ever made.
media.notes: ⛔ Officially delisted. Unofficial PC fan recreation and preservation exists. PS4 installs still function on consoles that have it.

media.title: Silent Hills
media.description: Canceled Hideo Kojima + Guillermo del Toro + Norman Reedus collaboration. Never completed. The biggest loss in gaming history.
media.notes: ❌ Canceled. Never released.

media.title: Silent Hill 2 (Remake)
media.description: Full remake of SH2 by Bloober Team. Modern controls and visuals while faithfully preserving the psychological depth of the original. Konami's canonical current version of the game. Excellent.
media.notes: Native PC (Steam) or PS5. Best current entry point for newcomers.

media.title: Silent Hill f
media.description: New mainline entry set in 1960s Japan. Written by Ryukishi07 (Higurashi/Umineko). Striking floral horror visual design entirely distinct from western SH aesthetic.
media.notes: TBA. Announced 2022. Highly anticipated.

media.title: Silent Hill: Townfall
media.description: New Silent Hill game by No Code (Stories Untold, Observation). Atmospheric horror; limited gameplay shown. Part of Konami's revival push.
media.notes: TBA. Announced 2022.

media.title: Silent Hill: Ascension
media.developer: J.J. Abrams' Bad Robot / Behaviour Interactive
media.description: Live interactive streaming event — animated story with real-time audience voting affecting outcomes. Ran Oct 2023–early 2024. Archive available.
media.notes: Accessible via silenthill.com archive. Web/mobile.

media.title: Silent Hill (2006)
media.description: Rose Da Silva takes her daughter Sharon to Silent Hill and becomes trapped. Directed by Christophe Gans. Loosely adapts SH1 and SH3 — the best video game film adaptation of its era.
media.notes: Recommended. Watch after SH1 and SH3.

media.title: Silent Hill: Revelation
media.description: Sharon/Heather Mason is drawn back to Silent Hill. Adapts SH3 more directly but executes it poorly. Over-CGI'd and tonally inconsistent.
media.notes: Optional. Completionists only.
